recommendations.title: The Astronomer's Dream
recommendations.overview: An astronomer has a terrifying dream.

recommendations.title: A Nightmare
recommendations.overview: A man has a fantastical nightmare involving, among other things, a grinning malevolent moon.

recommendations.title: The Man with the Rubber Head
recommendations.overview: A chemist carries out a bizarre experiment with his own head.

recommendations.title: The Impossible Voyage
recommendations.overview: Using every known means of transportation, several savants from the Geographic Society undertake a journey through the Alps to the Sun which finishes under the sea.

recommendations.title: The Vanishing Lady
recommendations.overview: Georges Méliès makes a woman disappear, then reappear.

recommendations.title: Le manoir du diable
recommendations.overview: In a medieval castle, a dark magician thought to be Mephistopheles conjures up a series of bizarre creatures and events in order to torment a pair of interloping cavaliers.

recommendations.title: Divers at Work on the Wreck of the "Maine"
recommendations.overview: Divers go to work on a wrecked ship (the battleship Maine that was blown up in Havana harbour during the Spanish-American War), surrounded by curiously disproportionate fish.

recommendations.title: Interstellar
recommendations.overview: The adventures of a group of explorers who make use of a newly discovered wormhole to surpass the limitations on human space travel and conquer the vast distances involved in an interstellar voyage.

recommendations.title: Cinderella
recommendations.overview: A fairy godmother magically turns Cinderella's rags to a beautiful dress, and a pumpkin into a coach. Cinderella goes to the ball, where she meets the Prince - but will she remember to leave before the magic runs out?  Méliès based the art direction

recommendations.title: The Four Troublesome Heads
recommendations.overview: One of the greatest of black art pictures. The conjurer appears before the audience, with his head in its proper place. He then removes his head, and throwing it in the air, it appears on the table opposite another head, and both detached heads sing
